title: Towny Spawn Menu
description: Towny's spawn command in sweet, beautiful menus that you can navigate through easily.
body:
# Towny Spawn Menu

Towny's spawn command in sweet, beautiful menus that you can navigate through easily.

Requires [Towny](https://github.com/TownyAdvanced/Towny) 0.98.0.0 or above.
If you're using Folia, [Towny 0.99.0.8](https://github.com/TownyAdvanced/Towny/releases/tag/0.99.0.8) or above is required.

# More details

Towny Spawn Menu adds a few inventories that help you navigate and teleport through all the nations and towns in your server. It supports towns in nations, nation-less towns, private towns and even towns that are at war!

The main menu (the one with all the nations!) can be opened using /townyspawnmenu menu or any of its aliases.

You found a bug? Want to suggest something that could be added to the plugin? Or perhaps just want to talk with us? You can join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/yqG4u2JnrV), or [Towny's Discord](https://discord.gg/k83xrcdqPG)!
